one_time_description: Gain from investments in Nation partnerships and businesses (FM Business Trust)
economic_notes: Nation has significant business enterprises including FM Business Trust (total revenue $36,833,870), Christina River Enterprises, FMFN Holdings Limited Partnership, and FMFN Distributors Ltd. accounted for under modified equity method. Community Trust and Agricultural Benefits Settlement Trust also active.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to missing budget information disclosures. Fiscal year is 2022 not 2024. Comparative 2021 figures were restated to include previously unrecorded restricted investments in Agricultural Benefit Trust. Tangible capital assets net book value not explicitly stated on balance sheet in the provided text (Schedule 1 referenced but not included). Long-term debt also includes ISC Native Claims Loans of $1,113,957 not included in long_term_debt figure above. Nation has significant modified equity business enterprises. No remuneration schedule provided in the extracted text.
